calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Kennedy for Robert Llanes.

The Court noted that it now has an amended petition for final distribution that changes the requested distribution. Mr. Kennedy stated that he has not heard anything from anyone since he filed the amendment. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order) noting that nobody showed up to object even though it gives them less.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
